mapper.select: SELECT id, title, start_date, end_date, color, user_id, team, description, created_at FROM vibe.schedule ORDER BY start_date ASC
SELECT id, title, start_date, end_date, color, user_id, team, description, created_at FROM vibe.schedule WHERE team = #{team} ORDER BY start_date ASC
SELECT id, title, start_date, end_date, color, user_id, team, description, created_at FROM vibe.schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.schedule (id, title, start_date, end_date, color, user_id, team, description, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{color}, #{userId}, #{team}, #{description}, #{createdAt})
